description:
At ir_typer.rs:1499, `Const::Atom(id) => Descr::atom_lit(format!("a{}", id))` renders atoms using their interned integer id rather than their source name. All atom literals in specs appear as :a1, :a2, etc. instead of :ok, :err, etc.

Affected fixtures: polymorphic, vr5a_cross_kind_eq, vr5a_typed_eq, attributes, concurrency_ping_pong, classify_two_clause

Fix: look up the atom name from the intern table at the Const::Atom arm and pass the real name to atom_lit.
title: ir_typer: Const::Atom uses interned id not name — atoms display as :a<N> in specs
